_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalized Human Schwann Cell Lines Derived From Tumors of Schwannomatosis Patients.

_contextSnippet: This assay revealed some differences in gene expression between parent tumor cells and their respective immortalized cell lines. 509/31,000 (1.6%) of genes showed a 2 fold difference...Of the 510 genes, 471 (92%) were expressed at a similar level in immortalized SWN cell lines and normal primary Human Schwann cell cultures
details: Detected differential expression in 509 out of 31,000 genes (1.6%) between immortalized cell lines and parent tumors, with 92% of differentially expressed genes showing similar expression levels to normal primary human Schwann cells
